title: antidesma neurocarpum var. linearifolium
intro: Antidesma neurocarpum var. linearifolium, also known as the linear-leaved variegated mangrove, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Antidesma neurocarpum plant, which is native to tropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Antidesma neurocarpum var. linearifolium include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
